name: Bendy
description:
“A playful little fellow. Bendy can get up to some naughty antics when left to his own devices.”

Hey guys! :D I'm new here, so bots can get bad (in my opinion). I've already tried to make some bots on c.ai, but they are still in the testing phase. So I hope you have fun with our "Little Devil Darling". Bye!

(Note: give me feedback so I can improve, please)
